day3_night_start.name: 私
day3_night_start.text: *家に帰ってきた。ベッドに横になったが眠れない。*

day3_night_start_2.name: 私
day3_night_start_2.text: *...Wait. The lock was strange. I definitely locked it when I left this morning... I had to turn it once more before it opened?*

day3_night_start_3.name: 私
day3_night_start_3.text: *...The lock must just be acting up. This apartment is a bit old.*

day3_night_start_4.name: 私
day3_night_start_4.text: *While eating dinner, I try to sort through today's events.*

day3_night_start_5.name: 私
day3_night_start_5.text: *The scratched locker. The passport photo cut in half. Seolhwa in the corridor. The words 'not yet.' The cherry blossom petal.*

day3_night_start_6.name: 私
day3_night_start_6.text: *Yuna's memory card. The story that transfer students disappeared. The locked rooftop door.*

day3_night_start_7.name: 私
day3_night_start_7.text: *Sea's jealousy. Riin's drink. Eunsu's documents. ...Too much. It's hard to believe all this happened in just 3 days.*

day3_night_sea_msg_2.name: 私
day3_night_sea_msg_2.text: *Sea: '{name}, today was fun! Let's go together tomorrow too♥'*

day3_night_sea_msg_3.name: 私
day3_night_sea_msg_3.text: *One minute later. Sea: 'Reply before you sleep'*

day3_night_sea_msg_8.name: 私
day3_night_sea_msg_8.text: *...6 messages in 13 minutes. Messages piling up without being read.*

day3_night_sea_msg_9.name: 私
day3_night_sea_msg_9.text: *I flipped the phone face-down. It vibrates. Another one. ...I ignore it.*

day3_night_recall.name: 私
day3_night_recall.text: *今日の出来事を振り返る。削り取られたロッカー。ユナのメモリーカード。鍵のかかった屋上のドア。*

day3_night_recall_2.name: 私
day3_night_recall_2.text: *転校してきて3日。この学校で転校生が『消えた』とユナは言った。*

day3_night_recall_3.name: 私
day3_night_recall_3.text: *……おかしい。この学校に来る前の記憶が……ぼやけている。なぜここに転校してきたんだっけ？*

day3_night_recall_4.name: 私
day3_night_recall_4.text: *両親は？ 連絡は……最後に連絡したのはいつだっけ？ 思い出せ……ない。*

day3_night_recall_5.name: 私
day3_night_recall_5.text: *...Strange. My memories from before coming to this school are... hazy.*

day3_night_recall_6.name: 私
day3_night_recall_6.text: *Why did I transfer here? I said it was because of my parents' work situation... but what situation?*

day3_night_recall_7.name: 私
day3_night_recall_7.text: *My parents? Contact... when was the last time I contacted them? ...I... can't remember.*

day3_night_recall_8.name: 私
day3_night_recall_8.text: *My old school friends' faces? ...Minsu. Minsu's face is... blurry. It was clear just yesterday.*

day3_night_recall_9.name: 私
day3_night_recall_9.text: *...What is this. Why can't I remember?*

day3_night_stat_crack.name: 私
day3_night_stat_crack.text: *……何かがおかしい。この感情は『好感』じゃない。これは……*

day3_night_stat_crack_3.name: 私
day3_night_stat_crack_3.text: *...Something is wrong. This feeling isn't 'affection.' This is...*

day3_night_stat_crack_5.name: 私
day3_night_stat_crack_5.text: *Why am I scared? Why am I trembling right now?*

day3_night_nightmare.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare.text: *……いつの間に眠ったのか。ここは……学校？ 暗い。*

day3_night_nightmare_2.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_2.text: *廊下を歩いている。自分の足音だけが響く。教室のドアが一つずつ開いている。*

day3_night_nightmare_4.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_4.text: *振り返った。誰もいない。……笑い声が聞こえる。*

day3_night_nightmare_5.text: "……先生が守ってあげる。どこにも行かないで。どこにも……行かないで……"

day3_night_nightmare_6.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_6.text: *走り始めた。廊下が果てしなく続く。後ろからヒールの音がついてくる。*

day3_night_nightmare_7.text: "痛くないよ。痛くないよ。痛くないよ。痛くない痛くない痛くな……"

day3_night_nightmare_8.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_8.text: *行き止まり。振り返ると……三つの影が立っている。笑っている。*

day3_night_nightmare_9.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_9.text: *I run. I'm out of breath. My legs are heavy. I can't look back. I absolutely cannot look back.*

day3_night_nightmare_10.text: "It won't hurt. It won't hurt. It won't hurt. Itwonthurtitwonthurtitwont..."

day3_night_nightmare_12.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_12.text: *When I look back... three shadows are standing there. Smiling. All three with the same smile.*

day3_night_nightmare_13.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_13.text: *Until yesterday I felt this smile was 'warm.'*

day3_night_nightmare_14.name: 私
day3_night_nightmare_14.text: *The shadows approach. Step by step. There's nowhere to run.*

day3_night_seolhwa_2.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_2.text: "1年前に……私もあなたみたいにここに来たの。"

day3_night_seolhwa_3.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_3.text: "あの人たちを信じちゃダメ。5日よ。5日以内に……ここから出なきゃ。"

day3_night_seolhwa_4.name: 私
day3_night_seolhwa_4.text: *ソルファの姿がぼやけていく。『5日』という言葉だけが頭の中に響く。*

day3_night_seolhwa_5.name: 私
day3_night_seolhwa_5.text: *Seolhwa's voice trembles. But it's clear. For the first time she's speaking in proper sentences.*

day3_night_seolhwa_6.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_6.text: "At first everything was good. The teacher was kind, Sea smiled at me, Nurse Riin made me tea."

day3_night_seolhwa_7.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_7.text: "...Everything felt warm. I thought this school was heaven."

day3_night_seolhwa_8.name: 私
day3_night_seolhwa_8.text: *Seolhwa pauses briefly. She wipes her tears. Her hand is transparent.*

day3_night_seolhwa_10.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_10.text: "They gave me... medicine... to erase memories... every day... little by little..."

day3_night_seolhwa_11.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_11.text: "...I didn't... swallow it. I... hid the medicine. To protect my memories..."

day3_night_seolhwa_13.name: 私
day3_night_seolhwa_13.text: *Seolhwa looks down at her own hand. The hand is transparent. The corridor tiles are visible through her fingers.*

day3_night_seolhwa_15.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_15.text: "Nobody can see me. Nobody remembers my name. I was erased from the attendance sheet too."

day3_night_seolhwa_16.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_16.text: "...I don't even know if I'm dead or alive. I'm just... bound here."

day3_night_seolhwa_17.name: 私
day3_night_seolhwa_17.text: *Seolhwa looks at me. Tear-stained eyes staring straight at me.*

day3_night_seolhwa_18.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_18.text: "Don't trust those people. **Five days.** The time you have left."

day3_night_seolhwa_19.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_19.text: "**Within five days... you have to get out of here.** Before you end up like me."

day3_night_seolhwa_22.name: イ・ソルファ
day3_night_seolhwa_22.text: "Nobody remembers. Here. Not even that a person like me existed."

day3_night_seolhwa_23.name: 私
day3_night_seolhwa_23.text: *Seolhwa's form begins to fade. Becoming transparent from the edges. She smiled one last time. Sad, but... the first smile I've seen from her. The word 'five days' and Seolhwa's final smile refuse to leave my mind.*

day3_night_wakeup.name: 私
day3_night_wakeup.text: *……！ 目が覚めた。冷や汗がびっしょりだ。*

day3_night_wakeup_2.name: 私
day3_night_wakeup_2.text: *夢……だったのか？ ソルファという名前。確かに出席簿にあった……いや、なかった名前。*

day3_night_wakeup_3.name: 私
day3_night_wakeup_3.text: *『5日以内に出なければならない。』……この学校から？ ……それとも、このすべてから？*

day3_night_wakeup_4.name: 私
day3_night_wakeup_4.text: *The name Seolhwa. It was definitely on the attendance sheet... no, it wasn't.*

day3_night_wakeup_6.name: 私
day3_night_wakeup_6.text: *...This isn't just a dream. Something is warning me.*

day3_night_wakeup_7.name: 私
day3_night_wakeup_7.text: *'Get out within five days.' ...From this school? ...Or from all of this?*

day3_night_wakeup_8.name: 私
day3_night_wakeup_8.text: *I take out the photo fragment I picked up earlier. The passport photo cut in half. ...Was this person's owner also 'processed'?*

day3_night_investigate.name: 私
day3_night_investigate.text: *これ以上目を閉じてはいられない。ユナのメモリーカード、書類、消えた転校生たち……すべてを繋げなければ。*

day3_night_investigate_2.name: 私
day3_night_investigate_2.text: *明日からは違う。この学校の本当の姿を暴き出す。*

day3_night_investigate_3.name: 私
day3_night_investigate_3.text: *...I need to connect everything. Tomorrow. Somehow.*

day3_night_deny.name: 私
day3_night_deny.text: *……ただの夢だったんだ。朝になれば全部大丈夫になる。*

day3_night_deny_2.name: 私
day3_night_deny_2.text: *布団をかぶって目を閉じた。*

day3_night_deny_3.name: 私
day3_night_deny_3.text: *I pulled the blanket over myself and closed my eyes.*
